<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.6 Chrome/144.0.7559.236 Electron/40.8.4 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6" scale="1" border="5"> <diagram name="Tools Workflow Mapping" id="fig0103"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="842" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="h1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5D8DC;fontColor=#2C3E50;strokeColor=#D5D8DC;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;" value="1. Define" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="110" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5D8DC;fontColor=#2C3E50;strokeColor=#D5D8DC;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;" value="2. Access" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="110" x="180" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5D8DC;fontColor=#2C3E50;strokeColor=#D5D8DC;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;" value="3. Prepare" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="110" x="320" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5D8DC;fontColor=#2C3E50;strokeColor=#D5D8DC;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;" value="4. Analyze" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="110" x="460" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5D8DC;fontColor=#2C3E50;strokeColor=#D5D8DC;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;" value="5. Communicate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="130" x="740" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a12" edge="1" parent="1" source="h1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#B0B0B0;strokeWidth=1;" target="h2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a23" edge="1" parent="1" source="h2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#B0B0B0;strokeWidth=1;" target="h3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a34" edge="1" parent="1" source="h3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#B0B0B0;strokeWidth=1;" target="h4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a45" edge="1" parent="1" source="h4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#B0B0B0;strokeWidth=1;" target="h5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a56" edge="1" parent="1" source="h5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#B0B0B0;strokeWidth=1;" target="h6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sql" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1A5276;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1A5276;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;arcSize=15;" value="SQL (Chapters 9-12)
Access and prepare data from databases" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="180" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sql_ext" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#1A5276;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=5 3;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="130" x="740" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="excel" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#17A589;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#17A589;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;arcSize=15;" value="Excel (Chapters 4-8)
Prepare, analyze, and model data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="320" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="excel_ext" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#17A589;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=5 3;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="130" x="740" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pbi" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F39C12;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#F39C12;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;arcSize=15;" value="Power BI (Chapters 13-16)
Analyze, visualize, and communicate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="460" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pbi_ext" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#F39C12;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=5 3;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="130" x="740" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#5D6D7E;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;" value="Communicate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="100" x="755" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#5D6D7E;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;" value="Communicate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="100" x="755" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#5D6D7E;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Arial;" value="Communicate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="100" x="755" y="315" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
